name: Texas Attorney General
note: Amid the political frenzy surrounding the impeachment saga of Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton, Mr. Cogdell didn't just enter the fray — he dominated it. With a mere three months to ready his arsenal, he and his team stormed into battle before the Texas Senate. It ended in a triumphant smackdown of 16 charges and the outright dismissal of the remaining four.

name: The Enron Scandal
note: One of — if not the — greatest corporate corruption cases in the history of the world was Enron. Executives scrambled to secure the best legal minds money could buy, mostly from the glitzy towers of New York. But not Sheila Kahanek. She placed her faith in Mr. Cogdell, who turned what seemed like an insurmountable legal Everest into a mere speed bump on the road to exoneration, while the others faltered under the weight of guilty verdicts.

teaser.title: The Enron Trial
teaser.note: Our client was the sole person acquitted in any Enron-related trial.

name: Waco & the Branch Davidians
note: Mr. Cogdell took up the defense of Clive Doyle, who faced charges over the deaths of federal agents at the Waco siege. Despite relentless media bias, he achieved a remarkable victory: his client was acquitted of all charges — against a backdrop of six other defendants convicted on multiple counts. His skill and tenacity became the focal point of the 2019 documentary and the 2025 Showtime series Waco: The Aftermath.

teaser.title: Waco / Branch Davidian
teaser.note: Won acquittal for Clive Doyle on charges tied to the deaths of federal agents at the Waco siege.

name: Prosecutorial Misconduct
note: In a case marred by prosecutorial misconduct, Mr. Cogdell's client emerged victorious. A United States District Judge issued a judgment of acquittal, uncovering instances of misconduct and holding the prosecution accountable.

name: Corruption Acquittal
note: In a riveting legal saga, the former New Orleans City Attorney was acquitted of conspiracy, bribery, and corruption charges — while multiple co-defendants faced convictions, underscoring our firm's commitment to justice.

name: Bribery Acquittal
note: In the widely publicized “Houston City Hall Bribery Case,” Mr. Cogdell and his client faced the battleground in two separate trials. Remarkably, his client — a former state district judge and city council member — was acquitted of all charges, including bribery and corruption, while multiple co-defendants faced convictions and imprisonment.

name: Surgeon Fraud Acquittal
note: In a high-profile legal saga, Mr. Cogdell's client — an orthopedic surgeon — was acquitted of all charges leveled against them, which included wire fraud, health care fraud, and insurance fraud.

teaser.title: Fraud Acquittal
teaser.note: An orthopedic surgeon acquitted of all charges — wire fraud, health care fraud and insurance fraud.

name: Physician Victory
note: In an exceptionally challenging legal battle, an alternative-treatment physician found themselves acquitted of multiple charges. The remaining charges were ultimately dismissed by the government following two separate trials.

teaser.title: Physician Victory
teaser.note: An alternative-treatment physician acquitted of multiple charges; the rest dismissed after two trials.

name: Conspiracy Acquittal
note: In the District Court for the Southern District of Texas, Mr. Cogdell's client was accused of bank fraud. After a rigorous trial, his client prevailed — acquitted of all charges, including conspiracy, wire fraud, and bank fraud — while all others involved were convicted of multiple federal offenses.

name: Mail Fraud Acquittal
note: The former President and CEO of Continental Savings and Loan faced a barrage of accusations, including conspiracy, bank fraud, mail fraud, and wire fraud. Thanks to Mr. Cogdell's expertise, the client emerged unscathed — acquitted of all charges.

name: Wire Fraud Acquittal
note: Dubbed the “NASA Operation Lightning Strike Trial,” Mr. Cogdell's client faced charges of wire fraud, mail fraud, and defrauding the United States government. Once again, his strategic defense led to a favorable outcome, with the client acquitted of all charges.

name: Pharmacy Fraud Mistrial
note: A pharmacy owner was charged with wire fraud and mail fraud. The trial judge granted the court's own mistrial motion based on prosecutorial misconduct following six weeks in trial.

teaser.title: Pharmacy Fraud Mistrial
teaser.note: Charged with wire and mail fraud — the court declared a mistrial for prosecutorial misconduct after six weeks.

name: Insurance Fraud Acquittal
note: Mr. Cogdell's client, a surgeon, faced a daunting legal battle. After a rigorous trial, the client emerged triumphant — acquitted of all charges, including insurance fraud and practicing medicine without a license.

name: Judge's Dismissal
note: A state district judge faced accusations of tampering with a governmental record. Remarkably, all charges against the judge were dismissed prior to trial.

name: Psychiatric Fraud Victory
note: Dubbed the “Spring Shadows Glenn Psychiatric Fraud Trial,” Mr. Cogdell's clients found themselves embroiled in a high-profile prosecution. Despite an exhaustive six-month trial, the client's case was ultimately dismissed, with the individual acquitted of all charges.

teaser.title: Psychiatric Fraud Victory
teaser.note: In the “Spring Shadows Glenn” trial, our client was acquitted of all charges after a six-month prosecution.

name: Innocence Preserved
note: A cardiovascular and thoracic physician faced scrutiny during a euthanasia investigation. Mr. Cogdell's client emerged unscathed as the grand jury “no-billed” the case. Following a Texas State Medical Board investigation, the client prevailed, further solidifying their innocence.
